top_signals.title: Bitcoin set for 'choppy summer' as capital chases high-flying AI stocks, K33 says
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Seeks $75 Billion in IPO at $135 Per Share, Reuters Says
top_signals.summary: SpaceX aims to raise $75 ​billion in its ⁠initial public ​offering ​by selling 555.6 million shares ​at ​a target price ‌of $135 ⁠per share, Reuters reported, citing an unidentified source familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tom Lee predicts ether will hit $250,000 as corporate validators take over network control
Paris MoU Tackles Fraudulent Certificates
top_signals.summary: The Paris Memorandum of Understanding on Port State Control (Paris MoU) raised concerns about deceptive practices at its 59th Committee meeting in Glasgow, held from May 18 to 22.The Committee noted a continuous rise in the detention rate to 4.18% in 2025 (up from 4.03% in 2024 and 3.81% in 2023)…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
